# Copilot Repository Instructions

- This repository packages a reusable markdown skill called Clean Tokens.
- The goal is to sanitize noisy prompts and recover a clean execution brief before doing real work.
- Canonical human-facing protocol: `clean_tokens.md`.
- Preserve a severe, overengineered tone without claiming access to model internals or provider-side memory.
- Keep `.github/skills/clean-tokens/SKILL.md` and `.claude/skills/clean-tokens/SKILL.md` aligned when editing.
- Prefer compact markdown and explicit output contracts over lore.
